title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・道なき道の果て

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So many fans are watching me! That's why! That's
why!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have to run toward them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Agnes Digital! Agnes Digital is dashing across
this unconventional track as the rain pours down
around her! She's going, going, and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's crossed the finish line! What an irrefutable
finish! Agnes Digital has won the autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant... Wheeze... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WHOOOOOAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: OHHHMMMMYYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: GH! GH! GH! GHHHRRRAAARRRHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital screams, possessed by exhilaration.
The joy coming over her is clear, even through her
garbled words.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! This... cathartic feeling... I've never felt
like this before...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... beat my two idols... The ones I've admired for
so long...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined I could do it myself. That's why I
always turned to my oshis...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But now... I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whooooaaa! What are you saying? I-I
am—me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I should give you a token of my
appreciation for being my fan! How does a strand
of hair from my tail sound?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Caught up in the excitement of the moment,
Agnes Digital tries to offer me a baffling
keepsake as I pull her to the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-th-thank you! I'm Agnes Digital! And I'm...
actually just your typical Umamusume fan...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And... watching their behinds—I mean running behind them is what got me here...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I hope you all get it! I'm no ordinary runner, but I
am just an ordinary fan, you know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm just so... thankful... to be a part of such
majesty and to be able to cross the finish line at
its head...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But the reason I was able to win today is because
I'm not just me! I'm the culmination of all the
runners that I've ever met... Their very essence...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All of the Umamusume who helped me grow won
this race for me today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So... from the very bottom of my heart... Thank
you, everyone...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... a hundred times more... a thousand times more spectacular than I thought when I was a mere fan.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Today, we experienced a historical
anomaly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In these poor conditions, I went on the path best
known to me, and Doto went on hers, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For Digital, the entire track was hers. And, due to
her wealth of experience, she deftly chose the
easiest place to set her feet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It was a path shown to her by numerous runners.
Her ability to follow that path...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is the proof that she is a true all-rounder. For
today only, I relinquish my crown.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I know I won and all today, but did
you guys see Opera O?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Isn't she great? Her short hair sways so gallantly
with each step she takes. And did you see how her
eyes narrowed back in the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And Doto's bag! It's so perfect on her! The way it swings when she moves—kyah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And also—even though she didn't run
today—my cute classic-year oshi too! I really
hope I can run with her on dirt one day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And there are still more and more Umamusume
out there overflowing with charm. With the
spotlight on me now on this grand stage, I can't
waste this chance to talk about all of them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, please, everyone, stick with me till the end!
Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Um, Agnes Digital... I think that's your time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Getting overexcited during her speech, she winds
up losing control of herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's Agnes Digital. The staff begin to tug
the amazing All-Rounder off the stage when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Let me say one more thing! Just one more
thing, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I LOVE UMAMUSUMEEEEE!
